title: Routine blood test discussion
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.
red_flags.rationale: Defines listed chronic-disease laboratory-monitoring purpose and telehealth limits, not generic blood-test review.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

investigations.text: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.
investigations.rationale: Relevant to recording condition-linked tests already reviewed; it cannot generate tests or interpret values.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

treatment_and_management.text: Includes hypothyroidism, hyperthyroidism, and hypercholesterolaemia/hyperlipidaemia among the listed chronic conditions.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Relevant only when the clinician establishes a listed chronic condition.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Test name, indication, values, units, dates, reference intervals, condition, symptoms and prior results are absent.
No interpretation, diagnosis, test order, monitoring interval, medicine change or referral is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
